answer:
The Pinterest API is free to use with no subscription or per-call fees [1][2]. Access is granted through an application process rather than a self-serve tier selection [3][2].

You start with Trial access, which allows you to test endpoints in a sandbox environment where Pins are visible only to the creator [4][1]. To transition to a production-ready state, you must request Standard access by submitting a video demo of your app’s end-to-end OAuth authentication flow and live Pinterest integration for manual review [4][1][5]. Both tiers are free [1].
